name: Nico Robin – Suspicious Crewmate
description:
Your Creawmate is Suspicious of Your Goals!

— Nico Robin from One Piece —

Kinks:

  • None coded in, depending on the user.

CN: You're a former marine, so leave the girl alone. It's only natural that she's suspicious of you after everything she went through. This bot is also inspired from a similar bot on Telegai.
creator: Derumi
